vocab.example: High-net-worth individuals often view luxury timepieces as a tangible asset that can be liquidated if necessary.

vocab.meaning: sự phức tạp về cơ khí
vocab.example: Watch enthusiasts are often willing to pay a premium for the mechanical complexity of a tourbillon movement.

vocab.meaning: sự sang trọng kín đáo (không phô trương)
vocab.example: Some people prefer watches that offer understated luxury, focusing on quality rather than flashy brand logos.

vocab.meaning: dấu ấn của sự xuất sắc/thượng hạng
vocab.example: For centuries, Swiss-made movements have been regarded as the hallmark of excellence in the watchmaking industry.

vocab.meaning: một cách thể hiện cá tính riêng
vocab.example: Wearing a rare, vintage watch can be a subtle expression of individuality in a world of mass-produced goods.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề thủ công vô song/không gì sánh kịp
vocab.example: People invest in brands like Patek Philippe because they represent unparalleled craftsmanship that takes years to master.

vocab.meaning: truyền tải cảm giác về sự đáng tin cậy
vocab.example: In professional settings, a well-chosen watch can help convey a sense of reliability and attention to detail.

vocab.meaning: đợt sản xuất với số lượng giới hạn
vocab.example: The exclusivity of a watch with a limited production run makes it highly coveted by serious collectors.
Certain models become extremely sought-after, causing their prices on the secondary market to skyrocket.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/sự tinh thông về công nghệ
vocab.example: Top-tier watch brands often use their flagship models to showcase their technological prowess and innovation.
